# fly_volumes (Data Source)

Lists volumes in a Fly.io application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_volumes" "all" {
  app = "my-app"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The application name.

### Read-Only

- `volumes` (Attributes List) The list of volumes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--volumes))

<a id="nestedatt--volumes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `volumes`

Read-Only:

- `attached_machine_id` (String) Attached machine ID.
- `created_at` (String) Created timestamp.
- `encrypted` (Boolean) Whether encrypted.
- `id` (String) Volume ID.
- `name` (String) Volume name.
- `region` (String) Region.
- `size_gb` (Number) Size in GB.
- `state` (String) Volume state.
- `zone` (String) Zone.
